title: Simple Ores Outline
description: Simple Ores Outline replaces ore textures with custom glowing border versions. Lightweight, plug & play. Compatible with Java Edition 1.21.11.
body: ![Simple Ores Outline replaces all default ore textures with custom versions featuring glowing outlined borders, making ores easier to spot while mining. No bloat, no extra files — just clean ore textures. Compatible with Java Edition 1.21.11.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a0970f6482f9f4f07072f487e5900ba11a196426.png)Simple Ores Outline replaces all default ore textures with custom versions featuring glowing outlined borders, making ores easier to spot while mining. No bloat, no extra files — just clean ore textures. Compatible with Java Edition 1.21.11.
